meaning: n.凡士林,凡士林的商标名
examples: This includes Vaseline, baby oil, mineral oil and cooking oils.
If you can't find any eye makeup remover, try baby oil or Vaseline to take off your eye makeup. It totally works!
Put concealer under your eyes, curl your eyelashes, and then use a tiny dab (use your finger) of Vaseline on them.
Investigators found the backpack, fireworks and Vaseline in a landfill last week after a two-day search.
Instead, take a tin of Vaseline, which will also melt, but will be less annoying.
